rusty_dagger.name: Rusty Dagger
rusty_dagger.description: A chipped, rusted dagger. Better than nothing.

iron_sword.name: Iron Sword
iron_sword.description: A sturdy sword made of common iron. Balanced and reliable.

silver_rapier.name: Silver Rapier
silver_rapier.description: An elegant, lightweight rapier forged from fine silver. Lethal in skilled hands.

wizard_staff.name: Wizard Staff
wizard_staff.description: A wooden staff capped with a glowing blue orb. Amplifies magical energy.

flaming_greatsword.name: Flaming Greatsword
flaming_greatsword.description: A massive two-handed sword that radiates intense heat. It crackles with fire.

ragged_clothes.name: Ragged Clothes
ragged_clothes.description: Torn cloth offering basic modesty but almost no protection.

leather_armor.name: Leather Armor
leather_armor.description: Tanned animal hide offering decent flexibility and protection.

chainmail.name: Chainmail
chainmail.description: Interlocking metal rings that absorb heavy blows well.

steel_plate.name: Steel Plate Armor
steel_plate.description: Heavy polished steel armor. Unparalleled protection, but heavy.

dragon_scale_mail.name: Dragon Scale Mail
dragon_scale_mail.description: Forged from the scales of a red dragon. Exceptional protection and lightweight.

health_potion.name: Health Potion
health_potion.description: A glass vial containing a bubbling red fluid. Restores 35 HP.

mana_potion.name: Mana Potion
mana_potion.description: A glass vial containing a glowing blue fluid. Restores 25 MP.

elixir_of_life.name: Elixir of Life
elixir_of_life.description: A rare golden elixir that fully restores HP and MP, and cures ailments.

rusty_key.name: Rusty Key
rusty_key.description: A heavy, rusted key. It might fit the old iron gate.

crypt_key.name: Crypt Key
crypt_key.description: An ominous black key with ancient glyphs etched into it.

dragon_egg.name: Golden Dragon Egg
dragon_egg.description: A surprisingly heavy, shimmering golden egg. Exudes warm energy.

shadow_crystal.name: Shadow Crystal
shadow_crystal.description: A dark gem that seems to absorb the surrounding light.
